FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Comp Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Refactors the mod to rely more on WorldObjectComps instead of a central WorldComponent.

patchNoteLines.li: Breaks down the monolithic WorldComponent into a handful of WorldObjectComps

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Toggle Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Makes each of the submod's integration features individually toggle-able.

patchNoteLines.li: Adds individual toggles for each of the integration mechanics
